entities.name: SOYBEAN
entities.description: A photoperiod-sensitive crop (Glycine max [L.] Merril) studied for flowering and maturity traits

entities.name: DAYS TO FLOWERING
entities.description: The number of days from sowing to the onset of flowering, also referred to as DTF

entities.name: DAYS TO MATURITY
entities.description: The number of days from sowing to physiological maturity, also referred to as DTM

entities.name: ADAPTABILITY
entities.description: The ability of the soybean crop to adjust to different environments

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity of the soybean crop

entities.name: GWAS
entities.description: Genome-Wide Association Study used to dissect the genetic architecture of traits

entities.name: FARMCPU
entities.description: A GWAS model used to identify significant loci

entities.name: BLINK
entities.description: A GWAS model used to identify significant loci

entities.name: MLM
entities.description: Mixed Linear Model used in GWAS to identify significant loci

entities.name: INDIAN ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: The geographical and environmental context where the soybean genotypes were evaluated

entities.name: LEE.GM03-3
entities.description: A significant locus on chromosome 03 associated with days to flowering

entities.name: S3_46108324
entities.description: An SNP marker linked with the locus Lee.Gm03-3

entities.name: S3_46108342
entities.description: An SNP marker linked with the locus Lee.Gm03-3

entities.name: GLYMA.03G227300
entities.description: A candidate gene for Lee.Gm03-3 involved in circadian rhythm and photomorphogenesis

entities.name: GLYMA.03G225000
entities.description: A candidate gene for Lee.Gm03-3 involved in circadian rhythm, gibberellic acid signaling, and red/far-red light signaling

entities.name: GLYMA.03G219100
entities.description: A candidate gene for Lee.Gm03-3 involved in cytokinin signaling and embryo sac development

entities.name: GLYMA.03G226000
entities.description: A candidate gene for Lee.Gm03-3 involved in meristem initiation

entities.name: CIRCADIAN RHYTHM
entities.description: The internal biological clock regulating the timing of physiological processes

entities.name: PHOTOMORPHOGENESIS
entities.description: The process by which plants grow and develop in response to light

entities.name: GIBBERELLIC ACID SIGNALING
entities.description: A hormonal signaling pathway that regulates plant growth and flowering

entities.name: RED/FAR-RED LIGHT SIGNALING
entities.description: A light-sensing pathway that influences flowering time

entities.name: CYTOKININ SIGNALING
entities.description: A hormonal signaling pathway involved in cell division and development

entities.name: EMBRYO SAC DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of forming the female gametophyte in plants

entities.name: MERISTEM INITIATION
entities.description: The process of starting new growth points in the plant

entities.name: E2
entities.description: A validated gene that influences flowering and maturity in the Indian environment

entities.name: E4
entities.description: A validated gene that influences flowering and maturity in the Indian environment

entities.name: E9
entities.description: A validated gene that influences flowering and maturity in the Indian environment

entities.name: E11
entities.description: A validated gene that influences flowering and maturity in the Indian environment

entities.name: E10/FT4
entities.description: A validated gene that influences flowering and maturity in the Indian environment

entities.name: PRR7/TOF12
entities.description: A validated gene that influences flowering and maturity in the Indian environment

entities.name: DT1
entities.description: A validated gene that influences flowering and maturity in the Indian environment

entities.name: DT2
entities.description: A validated gene that influences flowering and maturity in the Indian environment

entities.name: PHOTOPERIOD SENSITIVITY
entities.description: The response of the plant to the length of day and night, affecting flowering and maturity
